actions.label: Research
actions.description: More discovery or validation work is needed before scoring or transition decisions.

actions.label: Grade
actions.description: Candidate should move into structured grading.

actions.label: Shadow
actions.description: Candidate is suitable for shadow observation but must not influence production output.

actions.label: Prepare onboarding
actions.description: Prepare bounded onboarding artifacts without mutating production.

actions.label: Retain
actions.description: Keep the current source posture; no change is recommended.

actions.label: Human review
actions.description: A human decision is required before any higher-impact transition or pruning action.

actions.label: Downgrade review
actions.description: A bounded downgrade may be justified, but only after human review.

actions.label: Deprecate review
actions.description: Deprecation may be justified, but only as a recommendation for human review.

actions.label: Reject
actions.description: Candidate should not proceed further in the source-ops lifecycle.

actions.label: Deprecate
actions.description: Record a deprecation recommendation or non-production lifecycle outcome.

actions.label: Approve
actions.description: The next allowed lifecycle state is approval, typically gated by human review.

actions.label: Block
actions.description: No transition should occur until the listed blockers are resolved.
